rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Based Upon Stipulated Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Ross C. Moody. The Hearing on Movant Richard Keith Suarez's Motion for Entry of Judgment Based on Stipulated Settlement Agreement is continued to September 15, 2021 at 2:00 p.m. During the continuance period, the parties are ordered to meet and confer regarding the disputed $44,037.25 in requested reimbursements. The parties are ordered to file a joint statement with the court regarding the status of meet and confer talks by September 7, 2021. The joint statement shall identify the reimbursement amounts agreed to, if any, as well as the amounts remaining in dispute with specificity.
